HGSS.054.0000:
Elder: You showed us what you’ve got,
and it is indeed good...\f
Take this Technical Machine.\f
However, you should care more about
your Pokémon.\f
The way you treat your Pokémon can
be too harsh...\f
Remember, Pokémon are not tools
of war...\f
HGSS.054.0001:
[0103,0000,0000]: ...\f
...Humph!
He calls himself the Elder, but he was\r
no match for me.\f
Sure enough, those who lecture how
you should be “nice” to Pokémon...\r
They cannot defeat me.\f
All I care about are strong Pokémon
that win every time.\f
The rest of them don’t mean anything
to me.\f
HGSS.054.0003:
So good of you to come here!\f
Sprout Tower is a place of training.
People and Pokémon test their bonds\r
to build a bright future together.\r
I am the final test.\f
Allow me to check the ties between
you and your Pokémon!\f
HGSS.054.0004:
Hmmm...
The way you battle is quite elegant.\f
You should be able to stand up
to Falkner.\f
And you should be able to make good use
of this...\f
It is a Technical Machine called Flash.
Take it with you!\f
HGSS.054.0005:
When a Pokémon learns Flash, you can
illuminate caves no matter how dark\r
they may be.\f
You can try it on BELLSPROUT,
for example...
HGSS.054.0006:
I hope you learn and grow from
your journey.
HGSS.054.0007:
It’s a powerful painting of a
BELLSPROUT.
HGSS.054.0008:
A Pokémon statue...
It looks very distinguished.
